backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor managing user authentication, study sessions, streaks, and settings with functions for login/logout, session start/end, settings updates, and statistics computation including daily/weekly trends and session distribution.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: streak tracking, session history, custom timer settings, daily motivational quotes, and statistics dashboard with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, and utilities for authentication, timer functionality, statistics, quotes, and styling with warm earthy color palette.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, featuring warm earthy tones and design tokens for background, foreground, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tracky application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with conditional rendering for authenticated/unauthenticated states, displaying header with auth button, timer settings, daily quote, pomodoro timer with streak, session history, and statistics dashboard.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button component that toggles between login and logout states with loading indicators and appropriate icons using the useAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/DailyQuote.tsx: Card component displaying a daily motivational quote with quote icon and author attribution using the useDailyQuote hook and gradient background styling.
frontend/src/components/PomodoroTimer.ts: Pomodoro timer card component displaying formatted countdown, progress bar, play/pause/reset controls, and current work/break duration settings from the usePomodoro hook.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistory.t: Displays a card with completed study session history, showing total sessions and time statistics, with a scrollable list of individual session items sorted by end time.
frontend/src/components/SessionHistoryIt: Renders a single study session item showing the date, time range, and duration in minutes with formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/components/StatisticsDashbo: Displays study statistics dashboard with total time, average session length, and session count metrics, along with a StudyChart component for visualizing data.
frontend/src/components/StreakDisplay.ts: Shows the current study streak count in days with a flame icon in a gradient card component.
frontend/src/components/StudyChart.tsx: Renders interactive charts (line and bar) for visualizing daily/weekly study time and session distribution by hour using Recharts library with tabbed interface.
frontend/src/components/TimerSettings.ts: Provides a collapsible settings form to configure work and break durations (1-90 minutes) with validation and save functionality.
frontend/src/data/motivationalQuotes.ts: Exports an array of 33 motivational quotes with text and author properties for display throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Manages authentication flow by combining Internet Identity login with actor-based backend login/logout, invalidating relevant queries and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyQuote.ts: Returns a deterministic daily motivational quote by using the current date as a seed to select from a predefined list of quotes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePomodoro.ts: Implements Pomodoro timer logic with work/break modes, integrating with backend session tracking and user settings for customizable durations, including start/pause/reset controls and progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including streak tracking, study sessions, user settings, and statistics, with automatic query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a warm earthy color palette supporting light and dark modes, plus base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography, container settings, animations, and extended design tokens for the application theme.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a Pomodoro study timer app with Internet Identity authentication. Tracks 8 implemented features including timer, authentication, UI design, streak tracking, session history, custom settings, motivational quotes, and statistics dashboard.
